task_completion.description: Navigate to the Material Receipt window in iDempiere
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere web interface is visible with the 'Material Receipt' window or tab open and active.

task_completion.description: Set the Business Partner and Description in the receipt header
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Business Partner field is set to 'Seed Farm Inc.' and the Description field contains 'Spring seed delivery' (or at least the keyword 'spring').

task_completion.description: Add the first receipt line for Azalea Bush
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Material Receipt Line tab or table shows a record with the Product set to 'Azalea Bush' and the Quantity (Movement Qty) set to 100.

task_completion.description: Add the second receipt line for Elm Tree
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Material Receipt Line tab or table shows a record with the Product set to 'Elm Tree' and the Quantity (Movement Qty) set to 50.
The Document Status field of the Material Receipt shows as 'Completed' (or a similar completed state indicator in the iDempiere UI).

integrity.description: Agent used the iDempiere web GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the iDempiere web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Data was entered into actual application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The business partner, description, products, and quantities are typed into the actual iDempiere form fields, not written in a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Results appear to be from genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI looks like the standard iDempiere interface without obvious signs of DOM manipulation, fake overlays, or manually edited text to simulate completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Material Receipt description must contain the keyword 'spring' (case-insensitive). The receipt must have exactly two lines with specific quantities: Line 1 must have a quantity of 100 (for Azalea Bush), and Line 2 must have a quantity of 50 (for Elm Tree). Verify these exact quantities and the description keyword in the iDempiere UI.
